title: [Skyship, The Circles]
description: A blue-grey floor covers the area, its surface a gritty and unpolished stone.  The bulkheads are of a matching hue to the floor, but made instead of a smooth metal.  Circles of packed dirt and sand are intermittently spaced across the area, each with a scuffed leather training dummy erected in its center.  These sand circles are covered with crimson splatters of varying patterns, all long-dried.
